nasb.text: Then the Lord sent Jerubbaal and Bedan and Jephthah and Samuel, and delivered you from the hands of your enemies all around, so that you lived in security.

esv.text: And the Lord sent Jerubbaal and Barak  and Jephthah and Samuel and delivered you out of the hand of your enemies on every side, and you lived in safety.

cnv.text: 於是耶和華差遣耶路．巴力、比但、耶弗他、撒母耳，救你們脫離四圍仇敵的手，你們才可以安然居住。

ccb.text: 耶和华就派耶路·巴力、比但、耶弗他和撒母耳从周围的敌人手中救你们，使你们安然居住。
